transcript: Speaker A: everyday you don't practice speaking English is a day you stay exactly where you are. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor, and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen. With me, you get real conversations anytime, anywhere. No scheduling, no awkwardness. Just you and me talking. I give you instant feedback on your mistakes, not after the conversation, during it, so your brain connects the correction to the moment and you actually remember it next time. Five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference. Ten minutes and you'll wonder why you waited this long. Let's practice together right now.
on_screen_text: everyday you don't practice speaking English is a day you stay exactly where you are I'm Loora your AI English tutor and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen with me you get real conversations anytime anywhere no scheduling no awkwardness just you and me talking I give you instant feedback on your mistakes not after the conversation during it so your brain connects the correction to the moment and you actually remember it next time five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference 10 minutes and you'll wonder why you waited this long let's practice together right now
summary: An AI avatar named Loora introduces herself as an English tutor offering real-time conversations without scheduling. She highlights the app's instant feedback feature during conversations to help users learn from mistakes. The ad encourages practicing for just five to ten minutes daily.
